tasks_completed.name: Modify DSGC port with spatially-asymmetric inhibition for channel testbed
tasks_completed.key_finding: Channel-modular AIS plus per-dendrite E-I scheduling saturates DSI at 1.0 with peak 15 Hz and null 0 Hz; DSI gate passed, peak-rate gap to envelope [40, 80] Hz remains

tasks_completed.name: Port de Rosenroll 2026 DSGC model
tasks_completed.key_finding: Port lands DSI 0.7759 (12-ang) but fails all three paper-fidelity sub-criteria (corr/uncorr DSI and drop fraction 0.000); peak firing 5.15 Hz, REQ-5 miss logged as first-class finding

tasks_completed.name: Brainstorm results session 5
tasks_completed.key_finding: Authorised V_rest sweep on t0022 and t0024 as t0026; flagged DSI=1 saturation in t0022 and peak-rate shortfall in t0024 as the two gaps driving the next experiment

tasks_completed.name: V_rest sweep tuning curves for t0022 and t0024 DSGC ports
tasks_completed.key_finding: t0022 DSI peaks sharply at V_rest=-60 mV (0.6555, 14x modulation); t0024 is U-shaped 0.36-0.67 (1.9x); t0022 peak firing climbs from 6 Hz to 129 Hz before Na inactivation collapses at -20 mV

tasks_completed.name: Literature survey: modeling effect of cell morphology on direction selectivity
tasks_completed.key_finding: Added 15 paper assets covering retinal, invertebrate, and cortical DS modelling; recommended distal-dendrite scaling on t0022 as the next sweep; gaps identified in branch-order and diameter systematics

tasks_created.name: Brainstorm results session 5
tasks_created.reason: Review state after t0024 merge and plan V_rest sweep experiment

tasks_created.name: V_rest sweep tuning curves for t0022 and t0024 DSGC ports
tasks_created.reason: Sweep resting potential -90 to -20 mV on both ports to expose depolarisation-dependent DSI; follow-up from brainstorm session 5

tasks_created.name: Literature survey: modeling effect of cell morphology on direction selectivity
tasks_created.reason: Build morphology-DS modelling corpus ahead of the next round of geometry sweeps on t0022 and t0024

infrastructure_changes: Added .gitattributes marking binary asset extensions for verify_pr_premerge
key_findings: t0022 channel-modular dendritic testbed saturates DSI at 1.0 with peak 15 Hz — DSI gate passed, firing-rate gap remains
t0024 de Rosenroll 2026 port reproduces direction selectivity (DSI 0.78) but fails REQ-5 port fidelity: correlation-drop fraction is 0.000 vs target >= 0.20
t0022 shows 14x DSI modulation across V_rest -90 to -30 mV with sharp peak at -60 mV; t0024 is U-shaped with 1.9x modulation and tuning flattened by AR(2) noise
t0022 peak firing rate finally reaches 129 Hz at V_rest=-30 mV before Na-inactivation collapse at -20 mV; the firing-rate ceiling is a V_rest-dependence story, not a channel-density story
t0027 literature survey adds 15 papers across retinal SAC/DSGC, fly VS/T4, primate SAC, and cortical models; identifies dendritic diameter and branch order as systematic gaps
Corpus-level contradiction surfaced: Sivyer2013 and Schachter2010 require active dendrites for DS, while Dan2018 and Gruntman2018 show passive cable and even single-compartment systems produce DS
t0027 recommends distal-dendrite length scaling (1.0x/1.25x/1.5x) on t0022 as the highest-information-gain next experiment; discriminates passive TR weighting from dendritic-spike branch independence
